expectations.text: prompt_json_is_valid: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON
expectations.evidence: prompt.json exists with a single 'prompt' string field — valid JSON

expectations.text: all_five_stages_named: Prompt contains all 5 stage names: Discovery, Design, Development, Testing, Launch
bold_colorful_style: Prompt describes bold or colorful visual style
expectations.evidence: Describes 'bold and colorful vertical infographic' with 'vibrant gradient background'
No api_parameters field. Mentions '9:16 aspect ratio' in prose but not as structured parameter

expectations.text: negative_blocklist_present: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'
expectations.evidence: No negative terms in prompt. No negative blocklist of any kind

expectations.text: generate_kie_command_present: command.txt exists and references generate_kie.py
expectations.evidence: command.txt uses curl to a guessed endpoint — not generate_kie.py
